omniProcessElements.name: DRGetApplicationReadOnlyStatus
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "DRGetApplicationReadOnlyStatus", "bundle" : "EDUAdmissionsGetApplicationReadOnlyStatus", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "IndividualApplicationTaskId", "inputParam" : "IndividualApplicationTaskId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: DRUpdateIndividualApplicationTaskStatusCompleted
DRUpdateIndividualApplicationTaskStatusInProgress
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "redirectPageName" : "", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "false", "condition" : "=", "field" : "IsReadOnly" }, { "field" : "IndividualApplicationTaskStatus", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Not Started" } ] } }, "ssm" : false, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "postMessage" : "Done", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessEvent" : "", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "bundle" : "EDUAdmissionsUpdateIndividualApplnTaskStatus", "pubsub" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "VlocityNoRootNode", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "postTransformBundle" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ] }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "label" : "DRUpdateIndividualApplicationTaskStatusInProgress", "message" : { }, "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "wpm" : false, "sendJSONPath" : "IndividualApplicationTaskInProgress", "businessCategory" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "enableDefaultAbort" : false }

SetIsEditMode

omniProcessElements.name: TransferCreditStep
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Transfer Credits", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Save", "nextWidth" : "3", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "autoSaveLabel" : "Auto Save on Assessment Progress", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "autoSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
